title: 7 Democrats seen as 'key' to advancing CLARITY Act
message_html: 7 Democrats seen as 'key' to advancing CLARITY Act ...
snippet: The CLARITY Act, introduced in July 2025, stalled in January after Coinbase withdrew its support for the legislation over concerns about legal protections and stablecoin yields.

title: Crypto.com receives UAE license tied to Dubai government crypto payments
message_html: Crypto.com receives UAE license tied to Dubai government crypto payments ...
snippet: Crypto.com's UAE entity became the first VASP to receive a UAE central bank SVF license tied to Dubai government crypto payment services.
